title: Get that Bag | #shorts
full_text: I got asked at a conference today, what keeps me positive? What makes me believe in myself and how do I keep going in building my business? And I realized that I don't even consider the alternative. Like, why would I not keep going? Every dumb fool I know is out there making millions and billions and he's going, so why can't I keep going? Nobody knows anything. That's the other thing that nobody knows anything. And the people who should have imposter syndrome don't even have imposter syndrome. I think everybody should feel optimistic at all times. The world is open. Stop reading the doom and gloom. I remember 30 years ago people saying eyeglasses will be extinct in 30 years because we have laser. And guess what? Now they're integrating AI in eyelasses. So no one knows anything and the world is open for people who want to save the day. So I tell you, go get that bag, woman. Go get that bag, men. And I'm going to go do that, too.
